channel.title: Courses on Andrew Liang
channel.description: Recent content in Courses on Andrew Liang

item.title: A simple neural network built from scratch written in C
item.description: Components of a neural network To quickly construct the neural network structure, I will use the Pytorth to construct a simple neural network for demonstration purpose. I purposely left out batchnorm, residual blocks, lower-precision, and other optimizations to keep the code simple and easy to understand. The structure is simple. It contains two fully connected layers with a ReLu activation function in between. First I will implement this class in C language, and then turn it into CUCA enabaled code.

item.title: A neural network that carries the physical meaning of XAS spectrum
A molecular dynamics simulation on liquid-liquid interface
XFTNR GUI software
item.description: A Python software that integrate a GUI with underlying algorithms for XFNTR

item.title: Profanity in Early Irish
item.description: This undergraduate course discusses profanity in Early Irish.
